{{Infobox character
| name = Angelwing
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Engineer (novel)|The Engineer]]
}}

== The Engineer ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Angelwing]] is a mid-level [[Advocate]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c15">''The Engineer'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Angelwing]] utilizes a purple mech armor with energy wings.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Angelwing]] provided footage of the incident.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c31">''The Engineer'', chapter 31</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
